summary: Iter 43 — P2 testing: Activity Logs + Employee Performance modules. Backend pytest: 11/11 PASS (activity-logs GET + filters, car create/patch/delete logging, user CRUD logging, clear-logs auth, employee-performance admin + satis self-only). Frontend: both new sidebar items (nav-activity-logs, nav-employee-performance) appear in Yönetim grubu for admin; Activity Logs page renders with 22 real log records, filter dropdowns (entity/action/user), clear button visible for admin; Employee Performance page renders summary cards (perf-summary-sold), top seller block (perf-top-seller), and performance table (perf-table). All data correctly shows real test fixtures (TestBrand LogModel create, TSTC1349 status_change Stokta→Satıldı, sale_price ₺150.000→₺175.000, Kalıcı Silme entries, TEST_perf_satis user create/delete).
passed_tests: PATCH /api/cars/{id} sale_price → activity_logs record (action=price_change, details.old=150000, details.new=175000, field=sale_price)
POST /api/users → action=create entity_type=user; PUT → update; DELETE → delete (all logged)
DELETE /api/activity-logs/clear with satis role → returns success=False (treated as forbidden)
GET /api/stats/employee-performance admin → performance[] each row has user_id/user_name/sold_count/total_revenue/total_cost/total_profit/total_employee_share; totals summary present
GET /api/stats/employee-performance satis-role → only own user_id appears in non-unassigned rows
Frontend: nav-employee-performance + nav-activity-logs visible in Yönetim sidebar group for admin
Frontend: /activity-logs view → activity-logs-page root + filter selects + 22 real log rows + admin-only Tümünü Sil (clear) button rendered
Frontend: /employee-performance view → perf-summary-sold + perf-top-seller + perf-table all render with admin TEST Co AS as top seller (2 sales, ₺240.000 profit)
action_items: OPTIONAL — main agent self-test: when triggering nav-activity-logs via Playwright `page.click(..., force=True)` immediately after `sidebar-group-management` click, the SPA setActiveView call sometimes appears to be lost in the same animation tick. Direct JS .click() works. Consider adding a small setTimeout(0) inside handleNavClick OR ensuring onClose() is async so React batched updates flush before close animation. Real users won't hit this — only flaky for headless automation. Functionality is fully correct.
critical_code_review_comments: activity_logs.py:50-57 — clear_activity_logs returns 200 with success=False for non-admin instead of 403. Better DX/security: raise HTTPException(status_code=403). Currently passes test because it returns success=False, but a 200 status for an unauthorized op is misleading.

stats.py:46 — employee-performance: 'satis' role hides non-self rows but UNASSIGNED bucket is still appended if any unassigned sale exists across the org. For multi-employee scenarios a satis user could see anonymized 'Atanmamış' bucket revealing total org sale counts they shouldn't see. Consider hiding unassigned bucket for non-admin/muhasebe.
helpers.py:32-49 — log_activity sessiz fail (try/except: pass) doğru tasarım, ancak logging.warning eklemek production debug için faydalı olur.

ActivityLogsPage.jsx:91 — useEffect dep [filters] makes inital double-fetch + every keystroke triggers reload; debounce önerilir (şu anda dropdown filtreler olduğu için sorun değil, ama user_id text input olsaydı sıkıntılı olurdu).

stats.py employee-performance: total_cost calculation includes 'Çalışan Payı' AND adds total_employee_share separately in totals → bunlar farklı ekranlarda fark görüntülenmeli; kâr hesabında Çalışan Payı zaten gider içinde, ek bir total_employee_share alanı tablo gösterimi için. Dokümante etmek faydalı olur.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (sidebar nav items, ActivityLogsPage with 22 logs + filters + clear button, EmployeePerformancePage summary+top seller+table all verified)

seed_data_creation: Test fixtures created and torn down within pytest module: 2 cars (TST*****, DEL*****), 2 users (test_iter43_*, satis_iter43_*, perf_satis_*). All deleted via permanent=true cleanup. Activity logs persisted (this is correct — they should not be deleted along with parent entity).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 43 P2 features fully validated. Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter43_p2.py is reusable for regression. Note for future Playwright tests: use page.evaluate('btn.click()') instead of page.click(force=True) for sidebar nav items if they're freshly rendered after group expand, to avoid the animation-tick race. Activity log records persist across test runs by design (audit trail) — pytest test for filter assertions uses 'any(entity_id == cid)' rather than count equality.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no real bugs. Only minor observations: (1) clear-logs returns 200/success=False instead of 403, (2) Playwright force-click on nav after group expand has timing race, (3) satis users may see Atanmamış bucket totals.
